description:
Bug: dev server crashes repeatedly when agent runs on large files

Dev server crashes 3+ times per session when an agent works on large files (e.g. 7,462-line auto-mode-service.ts). Memory is ruled out: 74% free, server at 300MB RSS, 16GB heap. No macOS crash reports. No OOM signals in logs. Looks like a clean process exit from an uncaught exception.

Reproduce: start auto-mode with TypedEventBus extraction feature and wait \~5 min.

Needed: uncaught exception handler that logs stack trace before exit, and process exit code logging.
title: [linear] Bug: dev server crashes repeatedly when agent runs on large files
